// tasks: Each key is a task Turborepo can run across every workspace.

build.// dependsOn: ^build means: build a package's DEPENDENCIES first.
build.//: Turborepo reads the workspace graph and parallelizes everything
that has no dependency between it, in topological order.
build.// outputs: Declaring outputs lets Turborepo CACHE them. A second run
build.//: with unchanged inputs restores these from cache instead of rebuilding.

dev.// cache: Long-running dev servers must never be cached or batched.
